response.justification: Candidate is a strong individual contributor with 13+ years of software development across web, mobile, embedded, and backend, plus some workshop/teaching experience and founder work on an open-source platform. However, the role is a people-management position requiring 2+ years of formal people management, 3+ years of technical leadership, and 3+ years building developer tools (compilers, test automation, build systems) at scale. The resume shows no formal people-management experience, no team-lead title, limited explicit dev-tools/build-systems work, and no mobile-platform ecosystem experience at the scale implied.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot engineering with testing/TDD focus and some tooling work (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup)
Founder of GISCollective shows ownership, roadmap thinking, and long-term technical stewardship
Teaching/workshop history (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, Web Internals) indicates mentorship aptitude
concerns: No evidence of formal people management or direct reports — role requires 2+ years
Limited developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure experience at the depth the role demands; no compiler or automated-release platform work
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience (iOS/Apple TV work was brief and product-level, not platform infrastructure)

key_factors.factor: Thin dev-tools/build-systems background vs. role focus
Deep engineering breadth and testing/tooling side projects
